name: Green BLR 2.0
description:
Green BLR 2.0 is Bengaluru's largest green running movement.
On 23rd August 2026, 5,000 runners will come together at Cubbon park for one shared mission to plant 5,000 trees and restore the city's lost greenery.
Every registration plants one sapling. Real trees. Real soil. Real impact.
Join us across three distances — 3K, 5K, and 10K and be part of the run that gives Bengaluru its green back.
Distances & Pricing
:
DISTANCE EARLY BIRD STANDARD TIMED
3K ₹499 ₹699 NO
5K ₹799 ₹999 YES
10K ₹999 ₹1,299 YES
Start & Cutoff Times
:
DISTANCE START CUTOFF MIN AGE
3K 7:00 AM 45 mins 5+
5K 6:30 AM 60 mins 8+
10K 6:00 AM 90 mins 10+
Race Inclusions
:
All distances includes:
Tree Sapling planted in your name,
T-shirt,
Medal,
Bib,
Breakfast,
Photos & Video,
5K & 10K additionally:
 Timing Chip, Timing-Certificate
Prizes
:
5K & 10K: Trophies for Overall + Age Category winners (Men & Women)
3K: Goodie bags for top 3
Bib Expo
: Details to be announced
Refund Policy
: All confirmed registrations are 
non-refundable, non-transferable 
under any circumstances.
Contact
: green@bengaluruletsrun.com | 9742812397 / 7676477642 (
General
) | info@thrivesecurity.in (
Sponsorship
)
Organiser
: Thrive — fitness community & security firm, India & UAE

🏃 Participation Rules
• Participants must be medically fit to participate.
• By registering, participants confirm that they are physically capable of completing their chosen distance.
⏱️ Event Rules
• Bib numbers must be worn visibly throughout the race.
• Participants must follow instructions from organizers, volunteers, and officials.
• Misconduct or violation of rules may result in disqualification.
🚑 Safety & Responsibility
• First-aid and ambulance support will be available.
• Participants participate at their own risk.
• Organizers are not responsible for any injury, loss, or damage.
📸 Media Consent
By participating, you consent to the use of your photographs and videos for promotional and marketing purposes.
📢 Event Changes
Organizers reserve the right to modify the date, time, or venue due to unforeseen circumstances.
💳 Refund & Cancellation Policy
❌ No Refund Policy
• All registrations are non-refundable.
• This includes personal cancellations, medical reasons, postponement, or rescheduling.
🔁 Transfer Policy
• Registrations are non-transferable.
• Category changes are permitted only with organizer approval before the deadline.
⚠️ Event Cancellation
• The event may be rescheduled or converted into a virtual run if required.
• No monetary refunds will be issued.
✅ Waiver Statement
By registering, you agree that:
• You are physically fit and adequately trained.
• You understand and accept all risks associated with participation.
• You waive any claims against the organizers, sponsors, and partners.

name: BENGALURU FRESHATHON SHINE INDIA 2026 5TH EDITION
description:
BENGALURU FRESHATHON SHINE INDIA 2026 – 5TH EDITION 🌟
🏃 Run. Shine. Celebrate Life. ✨
🔥 Bangalore's Most Electrifying Running Festival is Here!
🔥 Special Launch Offer: Get 40% OFF on registration fees – Valid only for the first 500 registrations!
Hurry and grab your spot before the offer ends!🔥
One City. One Community. One Mission — To SHINE!
Get ready to experience a morning filled with energy, excitement, and inspiration at BENGALURU FRESHATHON SHINE INDIA 2026 – 5th Edition.
This is more than just a run. It's a celebration of fitness, deteracmination, happiness, and community spirit. Whether you're a first-time runner, a fitness enthusiast, or a seasoned athlete, this event is designed for everyone who believes in pushing boundaries and embracing a healthier lifestyle.
💫 Run for Fitness. Run for Fun. Run to SHINE.
Feel the adrenaline rush as thousands of runners come together to light up the beautiful streets of Bangalore with positivity and passion.
📅 Date: Sunday, 13th September 2026
📍 Venue: Cubbon Park, Bangalore
🏅 Run Categories
🟢 3 KM Fun Run
Start your journey. Enjoy the experience. Celebrate every step.
🟡 5 KM Timed Run
Challenge yourself. Beat your personal best. Feel the thrill of competition.
🔵 10 KM Timed Run
Push your limits. Test your endurance. Conquer the challenge.
🎁 Runner Entitlements
✅ Official Event T-Shirt
✅ Finisher Medal
✅ E-Certificate
✅ Timing Bib & Chip (5K & 10K Categories)
✅ Refreshments & Hydration Support
✅ Professional Route Management
✅ High-Energy Warm-Up Sessions
✅ Medical & Safety Support
⏰ Event Schedule
🕠 Reporting Time: 5:30 AM
🚩 Flag-Off: 6:15 AM onwards (Category-wise)
🌟 WHY YOU SHOULD JOIN? 🌟
🔥 Be part of one of Bangalore's most vibrant running communities.
🔥 Celebrate fitness, friendship, and positivity.
🔥 Create unforgettable memories with family and friends.
🔥 Earn your medal and achieve your personal milestone.
🔥 Experience the unmatched energy of thousands running together.
💥 BANGALORE, THIS IS YOUR MOMENT! 💥YOUR CITY.YOUR ENERGY.YOUR CHALLENGE.YOUR SHINE.
Lace up your shoes, gather your squad, and get ready to be part of an unforgettable running experience.
✨ Let's Run. Let's Rise. Let's SHINE. ✨

name: Breakthrough Run
description:
Breakthrough Run
Resolution started the journey. Commitment kept you showing up. Persistence carried you through. Now it’s time for your breakthrough.
The Breakthrough Run is the fourth and final event in the four-run journey that transforms intentions into habits and habits into lasting change.
Featuring distances up to the Half Marathon (21.1K), this edition allows participants to celebrate how far they have come and achieve the goals they set for themselves at the beginning of the year.
With every step, you complete the journey — and earn the beautiful composite medal that symbolises a year of intention, commitment, persistence, and breakthrough.
Because breakthroughs aren’t found in a single moment, they are built through the choices you make, one step at a time. With every step, you move closer to completing the journey - and to earning the beautiful composite medal that represents your progress through the series.
Series Finisher Reward
As part of the 4-Run Series, participants who complete all four runs will earn a special composite finisher medal - the Soaring Eagle, a symbol of consistency, strength, and commitment across the year.
Race Categories
Timed 21.1k
Timed 10k
Timed 5k
Non-timed 3k
Non-timed 1.6k
Participant Perks
The Unmatched BeAthlit Experience
Personalised Finisher Medal
Cool Runner's T-shirt
Snack Box
Professional Event Photos
Hydration stations every 800 Mtrs
Venue Details
NICE Tollgate Hosakerehalli, NICE Road
Parking will be available near the event venue.
Event Requirements
 Open to all age groups
 Registration fees are non-refundable
 Participants must follow event rules and local regulations
 Respect the venue, volunteers, and fellow runners

name: TIMES INTERNET HALF MARATHON - BENGALURU
description:
Times Internet Half Marathon
 is one of Bengaluru's most exciting running events, bringing together runners of all ages, fitness levels, and goals.
If you’re searching for a 
half marathon in Bengaluru, a 10K timed run, a 5K fitness run, or a 3K family fun run
, this event is designed for you.
Whether you want to set a personal record, build a fitness routine, run with your partner or friends, or enjoy a memorable morning with your family — 
this marathon offers the perfect platform
.
Race Categories
21.1K Half Marathon – Timed Run
10K Timed Run
5K Timed Run
3K Fun Run for beginners, kids & families
These categories ensure that both serious runners and first-time participants have a place at the starting line.
Why Participate in the TI Half Marathon
This event is curated to give every participant a safe, enjoyable, and high-value running experience.
Professionally measured & marked route
Music zones & high-energy cheer points
Hydration stations across the course
On-ground medical support & emergency response
Finisher certificate for all categories
Official timing chips for competitive runners
Race kit with bib, T-shirt/Jersey
Smooth, well-organised experience by Times Internet
If you are searching for a verified, well-managed running event in Bengaluru, this is your best choice.
Who Should Join
Perfect for:
Runners preparing for major marathons
Fitness and wellness enthusiasts
Individuals starting their running journey
Families looking for a morning outdoor activity
Kids and beginners participating in their first event
Corporate teams & running clubs
This event caters to 
professionals, amateurs, hobby runners, and families
 — ensuring everyone enjoys the marathon environment.
The TI Marathon Experience
This marathon is more than a run — it’s a city-wide fitness celebration.
Expect a vibrant atmosphere, enthusiastic volunteers, energising music, and a route filled with runners pushing towards one common goal: to run their best race.
If you’ve been looking to participate in a Bengaluru running event, join a fitness challenge, or complete your first marathon distance, this is the perfect opportunity.
Register Now — Early Bird Offer LIVE
Limited Early Bird slots are available.
Secure your place today and start preparing for one of Bengaluru's most inspiring running events.

name: Namma Hejje Bengaluru Half Marathon 2027 - First Edition
description:
Namma Hejje Bengaluru Half Marathon 2027| Experience Bengaluru, One Kilometer at a Time.
Lace up your running shoes and join Namma Hejje 2027, a celebration of fitness, community, and the vibrant spirit of India's Garden City.
Whether you're taking on your very first 5K, chasing a new personal best in the 10K, or pushing your limits in the Half Marathon (21.1K), this event welcomes runners of all ages and abilities.
Run through Bengaluru's iconic streets alongside thousands of passionate runners while enjoying a professionally organized race experience featuring timed bibs, premium finisher medals, event T-shirts, on-route hydration and refreshments, post-race breakfast, energetic Zumba warm-up sessions, music, cheering zones, medical support, and much more.
More than just a race, Namma Hejje Half Marathon is about celebrating determination, bringing communities together, and experiencing the city one kilometer at a time.
Race Categories
🏃 5K Fun Run
🏃‍♀️ 10K Timed Run
🏅 21.1K Half Marathon
What's Included?
Every registered participant will receive:
👕 T-shirt
🏃 Race Bib (Timed or Non-Timed, 5K is Non-Timed)
🏅 Finisher Medal
💧 On-route Hydration & Refreshments
🍌 Post-Race Breakfast
🎉 Zumba Warm-up Session
🎵 Live Music & Race-Day Entertainment
📸 Professional Event Photography
🚑 Medical Support Throughout the Event
✨ A memorable race-day experience with thousands of fellow runners
Amenities and inclusions may vary slightly depending on the race category.
Prizes
To be announced
For collaborations and bulk registrations, contact us at 9945117253/8660164161
Every step counts. Every finisher is celebrated.
Namma Hejje. Experience Bengaluru, One Kilometer at a Time.
